hyperedges.label: Two-layer command enforcement: settings.json deny list + pre-bash.sh hard safety net
MCP server trio: GitHub, Postgres, Datadog — all env-var credentials, no hardcoding
Skill install pipeline: package.json → install.js → team skills + caveman-installer → .claude/skills/
Security enforcement triad: security rules, gosec linter, pre-commit check
CI quality gates enforced by testing rules, CI rules, and linter config

nodes.label: All implementation packages must live under /internal/
nodes.norm_label: all implementation packages must live under /internal/

nodes.label: Layer dependency direction: handler → service → domain ← repository
nodes.norm_label: layer dependency direction: handler → service → domain ← repository

nodes.label: Observability interfaces in domain (Logger, MetricsRecorder) injected via constructor
nodes.norm_label: observability interfaces in domain (logger, metricsrecorder) injected via constructor

nodes.label: Interfaces belong in consuming package, not implementing package
nodes.norm_label: interfaces belong in consuming package, not implementing package

nodes.label: Never store context.Context in a struct — pass as first parameter
nodes.norm_label: never store context.context in a struct — pass as first parameter

nodes.label: Forbidden patterns: global mutable state, interface{}/any, init() with I/O, type switches for behavior
nodes.norm_label: forbidden patterns: global mutable state, interface{}/any, init() with i/o, type switches for behavior

nodes.label: What Must NOT Be Mocked (DB, context, sentinel errors, Logger)
nodes.norm_label: what must not be mocked (db, context, sentinel errors, logger)

nodes.label: LLM-as-judge grading for agent output tests
nodes.norm_label: llm-as-judge grading for agent output tests

nodes.label: Secrets Policy (no hardcode, no .env write, env vars only)
nodes.norm_label: secrets policy (no hardcode, no .env write, env vars only)

nodes.label: Auth Model (RS256, JWT, JWKS, claims propagation via context)
nodes.norm_label: auth model (rs256, jwt, jwks, claims propagation via context)

nodes.label: Vulnerability Classes (SQLi, XSS, SSRF, cmd injection, path traversal, open redirect)
nodes.norm_label: vulnerability classes (sqli, xss, ssrf, cmd injection, path traversal, open redirect)

nodes.label: Dependency Security (go mod tidy, pin versions)
nodes.norm_label: dependency security (go mod tidy, pin versions)

nodes.label: JWT claims propagation via unexported context key
nodes.norm_label: jwt claims propagation via unexported context key

nodes.label: CI Linter Configuration (non-negotiable + recommended + blocked linters)
nodes.norm_label: ci linter configuration (non-negotiable + recommended + blocked linters)

nodes.label: Merge Requirements (7 gates, go mod tidy, no nolint on security, no races)
nodes.norm_label: merge requirements (7 gates, go mod tidy, no nolint on security, no races)

nodes.label: C4 Model (4 levels: Context, Container, Component, Code)
nodes.norm_label: c4 model (4 levels: context, container, component, code)

nodes.label: WCAG 2.2 Accessibility (POUR, contrast ratios, keyboard model)
nodes.norm_label: wcag 2.2 accessibility (pour, contrast ratios, keyboard model)

nodes.label: Typography constraints (45–90 char line length, type scale, typeface roles)
nodes.norm_label: typography constraints (45–90 char line length, type scale, typeface roles)

nodes.label: errcheck linter (unchecked errors, type assertions, blank)
nodes.norm_label: errcheck linter (unchecked errors, type assertions, blank)

nodes.label: gosec linter (security checks, hardcoded creds, weak crypto, SQLi)
nodes.norm_label: gosec linter (security checks, hardcoded creds, weak crypto, sqli)

nodes.label: gofumpt linter (strict formatting, superset of gofmt)
nodes.norm_label: gofumpt linter (strict formatting, superset of gofmt)

nodes.label: Skill distribution via GitHub Packages (npm versioned packages)
nodes.norm_label: skill distribution via github packages (npm versioned packages)

nodes.label: Minimal Fork Path (Stage 1: no DB, Stage 2: persistence, Stage 3: scale)
nodes.norm_label: minimal fork path (stage 1: no db, stage 2: persistence, stage 3: scale)

nodes.label: Graphify commands (query, path, explain, watch, wiki, svg)
nodes.norm_label: graphify commands (query, path, explain, watch, wiki, svg)
